TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Fukid, title = Fukid, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fukid} }

S.FORM: Fukid Itiniay i Taitung Cen no Taitung ko Fukid a niyaro', 69 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 199 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 52% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 103 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 48% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 96 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 42%, Paiwan 5%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 3%, roma 1%. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: fo~u~uki…¨~…ģ itiniaj i taito~u~uŇč ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u fo~u~uki…¨~…ģ a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%. o~u kata…¨~…ģamaanan no~u nijaro~u °
S.FORM: Fukid Itiniay i Taitung Cen no Taitung ko Fukid a niyaro', 69 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 199 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 52% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 103 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 48% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 96 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 42%, Paiwan 5%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 3%, roma 1%. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: fo~u~uki…¨~…ģ itiniaj i taito~u~uŇč ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u fo~u~uki…¨~…ģ a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%. o~u kata…¨~…ģamaanan no~u nijaro~u °
